DashboardEmptyHint: Create tile folders in the .dashboard/ directory of your workspace to display them here.
DashboardNoTilesHint: Click "+ Add tile" in the toolbar to add tiles.
RefreshRunning: Refresh in progress — click to view log
RefreshQueued: Queued — waiting for current refresh to finish
RemoveTileConfirm: Remove tile "{0}"? This will also delete the folder and all its files from .dashboard/.
TileGenerating: Generating content… this may take a moment.
TileChatPlaceholder: Describe the tile you want to create…
TileChatEmpty: Describe the dashboard tile you’d like — Claude will ask follow-up questions if needed.
TileChatError: Could not get a response. Please try again.
TileConfigDisplayTitleHint: Leave empty to use the slug
TileConfigScriptContentHint: Paste your script here. Leave empty if you want a prompt-only or static tile. Supported: .ps1 (Windows) / .sh (Linux/macOS).
TileConfigPromptHint: LLM instruction for auto-refresh. Leave empty to skip (prefer a script when feasible).
